/usr/bin/ar qc libdmk.a CMakeFiles/DMKOBJS.dir/src/dmk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DMKOBJS.dir/src/proxy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DMKOBJS.dir/src/tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DMKOBJS.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dmk_ref_common.dir/src/common/fmmcommon2d.f.o CMakeFiles/dmk_ref_common.dir/src/common/hkrand.f.o CMakeFiles/dmk_ref_common.dir/src/common/lapack_f77.f.o /usr/bin/ranlib libdmk.a
